app.name: PathSmith
app.settingsLanguageRestartNote: I save the selected language right away, but I only load it after PathSmith restarts.
app.settingsOrganizerDescription: Choose how PathSmith resolves dates, lays out folders, and optionally renames files before reordering.
app.settingsOrganizerRenameHint: Date-stamp renaming uses the resolved date and falls back to the original filename when no date is available.
app.settingsOrganizerUnknownFolderHint: Files without a usable date land in this folder.
app.settingsCleanupIgnoreDescription: Files with these exact names do not make a folder count as non-empty during cleanup scans.
app.settingsCleanupIgnoreHint: Useful for metadata files such as .DS_Store, Thumbs.db, or desktop.ini.
app.organizerPreviewDescription: PathSmith scans the selected root, resolves dates according to the active rule, and plans safe destination paths before any file moves.
app.organizerDestinationsDescription: These are the folders PathSmith would populate from the current root.
app.organizerMovesDescription: A compact sample of the planned moves so you can spot source selection, renaming, or collisions before applying.
app.organizerChooseRootBody: Select the library root and PathSmith will preview how images and videos would be reorganized.
app.organizerNoMediaBody: This root does not contain supported images or videos yet.
app.organizerNoChangesBody: PathSmith found media here, but every file already matches the current organizer rules.
app.organizerPreviewErrorBody: PathSmith could not build the reordering preview right now. Try again from the desktop app.
app.cleanupGraphDescription: The graph groups empty folders by depth so it is easier to see where the hollow spots are clustering.
app.cleanupNoFoldersFoundBody: This root has no empty folders right now.
app.cleanupChooseRootBody: Select the cleanup root and PathSmith will build a tree with the empty folders found under it.
app.cleanupScanErrorBody: PathSmith could not scan this root right now. Try again from the desktop app.

messages.previewMode: Preview mode only. Run `npm run tauri:dev` to use the native folder dialog.
messages.nativeDialogOnly: Native folder picking is available once PathSmith is running through Tauri.
messages.organizerPreviewEmpty: Organizer preview complete. Nothing needs moving.
messages.cleanupScanEmpty: Scan complete. No empty folders found.

organizer.title: Library Organizer
organizer.intro: Sort images and videos into a structure that stays readable over time.
organizer.outcome: Build a dated library with preview-first moves, safe renaming, and room for more automation later.

cleanup.title: Empty Folder Sweep
cleanup.intro: Remove the hollow folders that remain after duplicate cleanup and manual pruning.
cleanup.outcome: Scan a tree, review empty branches, and delete only the directories I confirm.
